languages.text:
Плазменный двигатель, обеспечивающий {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}скорость{/g} 14, а также мощное {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}ускорение и торможение{/g}.
Когда корабль поврежден более чем на 25% (прочность корабля ниже 75%), скорость увеличивается на 2 ед.

traits.locale_text:
Плазменный двигатель, обеспечивающий {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}скорость{/g} 14, а также мощное {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}ускорение и торможение{/g}.
Когда корабль поврежден более чем на 25% (прочность корабля ниже 75%), скорость увеличивается на 2 ед.

languages.text:
Этот плазменный двигатель обеспечивает {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}скорость{/g} 14, а также среднее {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}ускорение и торможение{/g}.
Если {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}целостность корпуса{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}флагмана{/g} составляет 75% или менее, его скорость увеличивается на 2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}ОПП{/g}.
languages.original_text:
This plasma drive provides 14 {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}speed{/g} along with average {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}acceleration and braking{/g}.
If the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g} has 75% {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}hull integrity{/g} or less, its speed is increased by +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
This plasma drive provides 14 {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}speed{/g} along with average {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}acceleration and braking{/g}.
If the flagship has 75% hull integrity or less, its speed is increased by 2 VMP.

This plasma drive provides 14 {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}speed{/g} along with average {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}acceleration and braking{/g}.
If the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g} has 75% {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}hull integrity{/g} or less, its speed is increased by +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g}.

This plasma drive provides 14 {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}speed{/g} along with average {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}acceleration and braking{/g}.
If the flagship has 75% hull integrity or less, its speed is increased by +2 VMP.

languages.text:
Dieser Plasma-Antrieb bietet 14 {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}Geschwindigkeit{/g} und eine durchschnittliche {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}Beschleunigung und Bremsleistung{/g}.
Hat das {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}Flaggschiff{/g} 75 % {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}Rumpfintegrität{/g} oder weniger, erhöht sich seine Geschwindigkeit um +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}LBP{/g}.

Hat das {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}Flaggschiff{/g} 75 % {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}Rumpfintegrität{/g} oder weniger, erhöht sich seine Geschwindigkeit um +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}LBP{/g}.

languages.text:
Este impulsor de plasma proporciona 14 de {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}velocidad{/g} y capacidad intermedia de {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}acelerar y frenar{/g}.
Si la {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}nave insignia{/g} tiene un 75 % o menos de {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}integridad de casco{/g}, su velocidad aumenta en +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}PMV{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Este impulsor de plasma proporciona 14 de {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}velocidad{/g} y capacidad intermedia de {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}acelerar y frenar{/g}.
Si la {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}nave insignia{/g} tiene un 75 % o menos de {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}integridad de casco{/g}, su velocidad aumenta en +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}PMV{/g}.

languages.text:
这台等离子驱动装置可以提供14点{g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}速度{/g}，以及平均水平的{g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}加速与制动{/g}。
若{g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}旗舰{/g}的{g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}舰体完整度{/g}不超过75%，旗舰速度增加2点{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}移动点数{/g}。
languages.original_text:
This plasma drive provides 14 {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}speed{/g} along with average {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}acceleration and braking{/g}.
If the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g} has 75% {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}hull integrity{/g} or less, its speed is increased by +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
这台等离子驱动装置可以提供14点{g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}速度{/g}，以及平均水平的{g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}加速与制动{/g}。
若{g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}旗舰{/g}的{g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}舰体完整度{/g}不超过75%，旗舰速度增加2点{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}移动点数{/g}。

languages.text:
Bu plazma iticisi, 14 puan {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}hızın{/g} yanı sıra ortalama {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}hızlanma ve frenleme{/g} sunar.
{g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}Sancak gemisinin{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}gövde bütünlüğü{/g} %75'e veya altına inmişse geminin hızı +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}UHP{/g} artar.
languages.original_text:
This plasma drive provides 14 {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}speed{/g} along with average {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}acceleration and braking{/g}.
If the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g} has 75% {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}hull integrity{/g} or less, its speed is increased by +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Bu plazma iticisi, 14 puan {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}hızın{/g} yanı sıra ortalama {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}hızlanma ve frenleme{/g} sunar.
{g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}Sancak gemisinin{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}gövde bütünlüğü{/g} %75'e veya altına inmişse geminin hızı +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}UHP{/g} artar.

languages.text:
Ce moteur à plasma se caractérise par un indice de {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}vitesse{/g} de 14 et une {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}capacité d'accélération et un système de freinage{/g} moyens.
Lorsque l'{g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}intégrité de sa coque{/g} est à 75 % ou moins, le {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}vaisseau amiral{/g} voit sa vitesse augmenter de +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}PDV{/g}.
languages.original_text:
This plasma drive provides 14 {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}speed{/g} along with average {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}acceleration and braking{/g}.
If the {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}flagship{/g} has 75% {g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}hull integrity{/g} or less, its speed is increased by +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Ce moteur à plasma se caractérise par un indice de {g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}vitesse{/g} de 14 et une {g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}capacité d'accélération et un système de freinage{/g} moyens.
Lorsque l'{g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}intégrité de sa coque{/g} est à 75 % ou moins, le {g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}vaisseau amiral{/g} voit sa vitesse augmenter de +2 {g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}PDV{/g}.

languages.text: このプラズマ・ドライブは、平均的な{g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}加速・減速{/g}とともに、14の{g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}速度{/g}をもたらす。{g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}旗艦{/g}の{g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}船体保全度{/g}が75%以下の場合、その速度は+2{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g}増加する。

traits.locale_text: このプラズマ・ドライブは、平均的な{g|Encyclopedia:AccelerationBrakingSpace}加速・減速{/g}とともに、14の{g|Encyclopedia:SpeedSpace}速度{/g}をもたらす。{g|Encyclopedia:FlagshipSpace}旗艦{/g}の{g|Encyclopedia:HullIntegritySpace}船体保全度{/g}が75%以下の場合、その速度は+2{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPointsSpace}VMP{/g}増加する。
